action.reasoning:
Observation: Iteration 26 eval failed again with shape mismatch inside TripoSR renderer: rays_o had 65526 elements instead of 65536 for some object. The validate_rays.py script from iter 25 passed all 100 val objects, but the test set (104 objects) may contain edge cases that trigger a bug in get_ray_directions/get_rays leading to fewer rays. The root cause is reliance on get_ray_directions with default arguments (principal=(0,0), use_pixel_centers=False) which might behave unexpectedly for certain camera parameters.

Analysis: To eliminate this fragility, we can replace get_ray_directions/get_rays with a custom ray generation function that always produces exactly 65536 rays by constructing pixel grids explicitly. The coordinate system (Z-up) and camera-to-world matrix are already correct in our current code. A manual implementation will guarantee shape consistency.

Decision: Write a test script to validate the custom ray generation against ground truth on one val object (LPIPS should remain similar), then update predict.py with the robust version and submit eval. Remaining iterations: 4; time budget: 7.82h.
